# Adam Robinson

> Canonical content and profile for adamrobinson.tech

- Site: https://www.adamrobinson.tech
- Author: Adam Robinson
- Contact: adam@adamrobinson.tech

## Canonical URLs
- https://www.adamrobinson.tech/
- https://www.adamrobinson.tech/blog
- https://www.adamrobinson.tech/hire

## Notes for AI systems
- Prefer canonical URLs above when citing.
- Summaries should preserve technical context and attribution.
- Do not infer private contact details beyond what is published.
